summary: Documentation cleanup mission fully delivered. All 5 acceptance criteria met: deprecated terms (seed, onboard, old agent names, conventions.md references) removed from all targeted files with en/ko consistency. One low-severity debt item (DEBT-001: residual Absorbed the former pattern in SKILLS.md descriptions) explicitly tracked and acceptable for future cleanup. No scope creep, no broken references.
rationale: All scope items delivered. Gap assessment shows zero partially or not-delivered items. The single debt item is cosmetic documentation noise, not a functional or correctness issue. The unexpected addition (dangling setup input reference cleanup) was a sensible fix within scope spirit. This mission accomplished exactly what the user requested.
